narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 3-C (precinct in Scioto County) has 723 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.7 percentage points.
